package rulecoverage

func PositiveMixedReceiverKinds() string {
    ruleID := "mixed_receiver_kinds"
    family := "consistency"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Methods on the same receiver type mix pointer and value receivers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
